name: Asgard 3" Angle Head
description_full: The Asgard® Adjustable Angle Head perfectly feathers the joint compound applied to both sides of internal corners in one pass. The Angle Head can be used for wall-to-wall internal corners or wall-to-ceiling corners. This tool's “adjustable” feature refers to the ability to control the amount of spring pressure by engaging or disengaging one set of tension springs on the back of the angle head. Angle Heads, or Angle Finishers or Corner Finishers, are attached to the CA08-AD corner applicator to quickly and professionally finish internal drywall corners. The 3” Asgard Angle Head has wheels to provide the smoothest action on the wall and is spring-loaded to help compensate for slightly imperfect corners. The Angle Head is also part of the Taping process when attached to the FH-AD or XH-AD support handles with the CFA-AD adapter.

name: Columbia "Sawed Off" Mini Automatic Taper
description_full:
## Master Tight Spaces Without Sacrificing Performance

The Columbia "Sawed Off" Mini Automatic Taper is engineered for drywall professionals who regularly work in confined environments. At 39 inches, it delivers the full reliability and output of a standard-length taper while navigating stairwells, closets, hallways, and low-ceiling spaces where conventional tools cannot operate effectively. Every job gets the same flawless tape embed — regardless of the space.

## Built for Longevity and Low Maintenance

The hard-anodized aluminum tube prevents track lines for a consistently clean finish on every pass. Corrosion-resistant stainless steel side plates, cable drum, and creaser arms ensure the tool holds up to the abuse of daily job-site use. An easily removable cap streamlines cleaning and maintenance, minimizing downtime so you can stay productive throughout the workday.

## Key Features

- **Compact 39" Length:** Engineered for full performance in stairwells, closets, and confined ceiling areas where standard tapers cannot reach.
- **Hard-Anodized Tube:** Prevents track lines and compound buildup, delivering a clean, professional finish on every pass.
- **Stainless Steel Components:** Side plates, cable drum, and creaser arms resist corrosion and withstand demanding daily professional use.
- **Quick-Release Tape System:** Adjustable brake and rapid tape-change mechanism reduce setup time and keep your workflow moving.
- **Reduced Corner Drag:** Precision-engineered geometry reduces friction in tight corners, cutting operator fatigue and increasing finishing speed.
- **Professional-Grade Reliability:** Built to the same standard as the full-size Columbia Taper — trusted by finishing contractors across North America.

---

## Technical Specifications

| Specification | Detail |
|---|---|
| **SKU** | STAPER |
| **Tool Type** | Compact Automatic Taper |
| **Overall Length** | 39 in (990 mm) |
| **Tube Construction** | Hard-anodized aluminum |
| **Side Plates** | Stainless steel |
| **Cable Drum** | Stainless steel |
| **Creaser Arms** | Stainless steel |
| **Tape Brake** | Adjustable |
| **Tape Release** | Quick-release mechanism |
| **Tape Width Compatibility** | 2 in (50 mm) standard drywall tape |
| **Suitable Applications** | Flats and angles; stairwells, closets, low-ceiling spaces |
| **Manufacturer Warranty** | 5-year against manufacturer defects |
| **Country of Origin** | Canada |
| **Brand** | Columbia Taping Tools |
description_short: The Columbia "Sawed Off" Mini Automatic Taper is the professional's go-to tool for confined spaces. At just 39 inches, it delivers full-size performance in stairwells, closets, and low-ceiling areas, featuring a hard-anodized tube, corrosion-resistant stainless steel components, and a quick-release tape system.

name: Columbia 1.5" PUTTY KNIFE
description_full:
## Precision Control for Detail Finish Work

The Columbia Taping Tools 1.5" Putty Knife is the right tool for every detail-intensive task on the drywall job site. Whether you are filling nail holes, patching small imperfections, feathering tight edges, or cleaning dried compound from surfaces, this knife delivers the exact control needed to achieve a flawless, paint-ready result. Its compact 1.5-inch blade is specifically sized for work in corners, around fixtures, and along trim lines where larger tools cannot operate.

## Built for the Rigors of Professional Use

Columbia Taping Tools has engineered this putty knife with materials that meet the high demands of daily professional use. The blade resists rust and wear, maintaining its sharp, responsive edge through extended job-site exposure to compound and moisture. The ergonomic handle is shaped to reduce hand fatigue during repetitive tasks, ensuring consistent precision from the first patch to the final touch-up. This is a tool you reach for dozens of times per day — and it will not let you down.

## Key Features

- **1.5-Inch Precision Blade:** Ideal width for tight corners, nail holes, screw-head spotting, and detail compound work.
- **Corrosion-Resistant Construction:** Premium blade material resists rust and compound buildup for long-term performance.
- **Ergonomic Handle:** Designed to reduce hand fatigue during high-repetition tasks, maintaining comfort and control throughout the day.
- **Stiff Blade Action:** Provides the control needed for scraping, patching, and precise compound application without flex or chatter.
- **Versatile Application:** Equally effective for filling, scraping, feathering edges, and cleaning tool surfaces between coats.
- **Trusted Brand Quality:** Backed by the reputation of Columbia Taping Tools, a leader in professional drywall finishing equipment.

---

## Technical Specifications

| Specification | Detail |
|---|---|
| **SKU** | NPK1.5 |
| **Tool Type** | Putty Knife |
| **Blade Width** | 1.5 in (38 mm) |
| **Blade Material** | High-carbon steel, corrosion-resistant |
| **Blade Profile** | Stiff / rigid |
| **Handle Material** | Ergonomic composite |
| **Suitable Applications** | Nail hole filling, patching, edge feathering, surface scraping |
| **Brand** | Columbia Taping Tools |
description_short: The Columbia Taping Tools 1.5" Putty Knife is precision-built for patching, scraping, and detail finish work on the professional job site. Constructed with a stiff, corrosion-resistant blade and an ergonomic handle, it delivers the control and durability professionals demand for tight corners, small repairs, and precise compound application.

name: Columbia 10" Automatic Assist Drywall Tool Flat Box
description_full:
## Effortless Finishing, Professional Results

The Columbia 10" Automatic Assist Drywall Flat Box redefines what professionals expect from a finishing tool. By integrating a precision-engineered spring-loaded assist mechanism directly into the compound chamber, this box actively manages pressure during each pass. The result is a noticeably smoother glide across flat joints and butt seams, with significantly less physical effort required from the operator — a critical advantage during long finishing days on high-volume commercial and residential projects.

## Engineered for the Demanding Job Site

Columbia Taping Tools are manufactured to exacting standards, and the 10" Automatic Assist box reflects that commitment. The internal components are precision-calibrated to deliver a consistent, ridge-free compound application on every pass, eliminating the inconsistencies that lead to extra sanding and touch-up work. Compatible with all major brands of flat box handles, this tool integrates seamlessly into any existing tool setup. description_full:
## The All-Metal Smoothing Blade Built to Last

The Columbia 10" Tomahawk Smoothing Blade is the finishing professional's answer to the chronic failure of standard plastic-component smoothing blades. By eliminating every plastic part from the design and replacing them with robust all-metal construction, the Tomahawk delivers a level of durability and reliability that standard blades simply cannot match. Whether you are pushing through heavy compound or applying a final feather pass, this blade performs with zero flex, zero wobble, and zero risk of breakage.

## Direct Handle Integration for Maximum Control

The Tomahawk connects directly to standard Flat Box handles, bypassing the fragile plastic adapters that are a common failure point in conventional smoothing blade setups. This direct connection provides a rigid, stable feel that translates into a more consistent, higher-quality finished surface. Critically, the design allows for intuitive, real-time adjustment of your angle of attack while in motion — giving you precise control over compound thickness and feathering without stopping your pass.

## Key Features

- **All-Metal Construction:** Zero plastic components — eliminates cracking, snapping, and deformation under heavy professional use.
- **Direct Flat Box Handle Integration:** Connects directly to standard handles, removing unreliable plastic adapters for a rigid, wobble-free feel.
- **Real-Time Angle Adjustment:** Allows on-the-fly modifications to the angle of attack while in motion for superior surface control.
- **10-Inch Finishing Width:** The professional standard for flat smoothing passes on joints and butt seams.
- **Superior Stability:** Rigid metal construction provides consistent blade pressure for a smoother, more uniform compound application.
- **Professional-Grade Performance:** Engineered to exceed the expectations of seasoned drywall finishers and set a new benchmark for the industry.

The integration with standard Flat Box handles removes the need for plastic adaptors, which often fail under the weight of larger blades. This design choice not only increases the longevity of your equipment but also enhances stability, giving you superior control over the angle of attack while in motion.

## Streamline Your Drywall Finishing

Elevate your job site efficiency with the Columbia Hot Mud Pump. Engineered specifically for professional drywall contractors who demand speed and reliability, this pump is optimized to handle fast-setting joint compounds with ease. By minimizing downtime associated with maintenance, this tool ensures you can maintain a consistent, productive workflow throughout the day.

## Rapid Maintenance Design

The standout feature of the Columbia Hot Mud Pump is its intuitive, quick-access architecture. Equipped with two heavy-duty stainless steel buckles, the main cylinder detaches from the pump head in seconds. This rapid disassembly is essential when working with quick-setting materials, allowing for thorough, hassle-free cleaning before the compound can cure inside the unit. Built to withstand the rigors of demanding environments, this pump is a dependable addition to any professional toolkit.

## Key Features

- **Quick-Release System:** Dual stainless steel buckles enable rapid cylinder removal for efficient cleaning.
- **Hot Mud Optimized:** Specifically designed to handle fast-setting joint compounds without clogging.

The Columbia Semi Auto Taper, often referred to as the "Bucket Taper," is the ultimate solution for contractors seeking speed and simplicity without the overhead of heavy-duty automatic taping systems. name: SurPro 20-30" Magnesium Double Sided Stilt
description_full:
SurPro set the bar and then broke it with the invention of double-sided drywall stilts. The newly updated SurPro S2 maximizes everyday performance by further elevating your comfort and stability. Better balance and comfort equate to less fatigue and added performance for drywall contractors. Step into our best-selling stilts for drywallers, worldwide. Reach new heights with telescoping height models ranging from a minimum of 16”, to a maximum of 40”. S2 Leg Bands provide 360 degrees of comfort and security and can be raised and lowered to adjust to the desired height. Durable and lightweight hexagon extruded frames presented in aluminum will stand the test of time. Double the wing bolts for added safety and internal parts longevity. Exclusive Interlock Enhanced Safety System for safety redundancy. Industrial non-marking, superior grip soles on all models. 225 lb. Max. Load (per pair).

Features: Extra-strength, lightweight Aluminum stilt body - hex-shaped design has proven a lifetime of dependability among daily users. Double side poles that will not twist or require constant adjustment due to our square tubing design. All ranges of height adjustment. And maximum stabilization for the best balance, security, and reduced fatigue. The most personalized fit - Fully adjustable stilt height, side pole calf height, and positioning, footbed length, forward and backward lean tension, and strap positioning. Super Comfy 360° Wraparound Leg Bands that flex with you, not cut into your legs. The double-clamshell design eliminates the unbalanced feel and discomfort of traditional stilts and maximizes safety (no strap to wear thin or wear your calves thin). Auto-Locking, Non-Slip, premium cotton webbed leg, ankle, and toes straps for a comfy secure fit. Industries largest footplates for a stable stance and better balance. Double wing bolts, front and back, for added security, when up high, and increased internal parts longevity. All sizes, except 16"-24". Safety First - Patented Interlock Safety System that adds redundancy at all crucial safety points. Non-slip SurPro Super Grip soles designed for commercial and residential job site environments
description_short: SurPro set the bar and then broke it with the invention of double-sided drywall stilts. The newly updated SurPro S2 maximizes everyday performance by further elevating your comfort and stability.

name: SurPro Wing Bolt Kit
description_full: Not all Wing Bolts used on stilts are created equal. Our customers love that we use special stop/spring washers on each of our Wing Bolts to ensure a secure fit without damaging the main body, or loosening over time. We are the originators of the "Double Wing Bolt System", and each individual stilt we offer uses two wing bolts on the front, and two wing bolts on the back - 4 per stilt/8 total Wing Bolts per pair of stilts (except sizes 15"-23" and 16"-24" stilts, which use 2 per stilt/4 total Wing Bolts per pair). This kit includes 4 total Wing Bolts, each with a washer. If you want to replace all of your Wing Bolts on stilts utilizing our "Double Wing Bolt" system (all stilts sized 18"-30", 20"-30", 21"-31", 24"-40" or 26"-40", regardless of model), you will need to order a quantity of two (8 Wing Bolts). For sizes 15"-23" and 16"-24" stilts, you will only need to order a quantity of one (4 Wing Bolts).

name: TapeTech 12" EasyClean Finishing Box
description_full: The TapeTech EasyClean® Finishing Box automatically dispenses the proper amount of joint compound and feathers the edges of butt joints and flat joints in one pass. The EasyClean Finishing Box helps produce professional results every time. The adjustable crown setting dial allows the user to easily adjust the amount of joint compound applied over the tape on the drywall joint. This is very helpful when progressing from the first finishing application to the second or third application. The pivoting axle helps to compensate when the drywall or sheetrock on one side of the joint is higher than the other side of the joint. The new EasyRoll™ wheel system allows you to expertly finish all types of outside corner bead up to two times faster than finishing by hand. EasyRoll™ wheels work with all types of outside corner bead including metal, paper-faced, vinyl and bullnose. EasyRoll™ wheels provide a shoulder to guide the finishing box along the corner bead without after-market attachments or damage to the axle. The shoulder of the EasyRoll wheels is more than three times wider than after-market products, making it easier to place, and keep, the finishing box on the corner bead. And EasyRoll™ wheels are engineered and designed to be perfectly aligned with the finishing blade, eliminating the need to tilt the finishing box like you must with common after-market wheel systems. EasyRoll™ wheels do not affect how the finishing box runs on standard flat joints. All TapeTech finishing boxes now feature EasyRoll™ wheels for finishing outside corner bead. Features Applies first coat of joint compound to embed tape at butt joints and flat joints on walls and ceilings Finishes butt joints and flat joints on walls and ceilings Feathers edges of butt joints and flat joints
description_short: The TapeTech EasyClean® Finishing Box automatically dispenses the proper amount of joint compound and feathers the edges of butt joints and flat joints in one pass.

name: TapeTech EasyClean Loading Pump
description_full: The TapeTech 76TT EasyClean® Loading Pump combines reliability with innovation. The 76TT features the slim tube design preferred by professional finishers and robust construction for dependable performance and long life. The TapeTech 76TT Loading Pump has a redesigned head and a new Twist-lock foot valve that provides secure attachment and easy removal for cleaning and maintenance. And the 76TT does not require a paper gasket for the filler adapter or gooseneck due to an innovative, integrated O-Ring that provides a terrific seal with fewer headaches from lost, worn or damaged paper gaskets. The 76TT pump accepts the standard 85T gooseneck and 90T filler adapter. Features Fills Automatic Tapers (with 85T gooseneck) Fills finishing boxes, MudRunner®, corner applicators and nail spotters (with 90T filler adapter)
description_short: The TapeTech 76TT EasyClean® Loading Pump combines reliability with innovation.

name: TapeTech Extension Handle
description_full: TapeTech is the first company to introduce an interchangeable handle system that allows one support handle to be used with every tool. Whether you use standard, fixed length fiberglass handles or aluminum extension support handles, you’ll need just one base handle. The base handle for the fiberglass system is model FHTT. The base handle for the extension handle system is model XHTT. The base handle fits the corner roller, corner applicator and nail spotter without any adapters. The heavy duty, easy-to-change adapter (CFA-TT) connects the new handles to the corner finishers, and the new, optimal diameter makes TapeTech handles the most ergonomic in the industry. Both base handles feature a D-shaped fitting that securely positions the handle in the Corner Applicator and positively prevents the tool from rotating during use. Note: If you use your current Nail Spotters with the new handle system you will need to mount the handle in the back holes of the tabs on the Nail Spotter.
description_short: TapeTech is the first company to introduce an interchangeable handle system that allows one support handle to be used with every tool.

name: TapeTech EasyClean Automatic Taper
description_full: The TapeTech 07TT EasyClean® Automatic Taper redefines quality, durability and value. The Taper simultaneously applies tape and the correct amount of joint compound for all drywall joints - dramatically improving taping efficiency. The EasyClean® cover plate can be removed with just a quarter turn for quick and easy cleaning or service. The stainless steel side plates, along with a hard anodized push rod and cable drum, prevent corrosion and provide long life. The adjustable brake allows you to set and maintain the desired tension on the main wheels. The control tube has enclosed rollers to provide the most comfortable grip while protecting your hands from the pinching that can occur with other brands. The integrated hook on the spool keeper lets you hang the taper from framing or scaffolding. The smaller diameter of the new tube protector provides maximum comfort and requires no tools to remove for easy cleaning and cable replacement. All these features make the new 07TT Taper the best choice for professional drywall finishers. Features Applies joint compound and tape to butt joints and flat joints on walls and ceilings Applies joint compound and tape to internal corners on walls and ceilings Easy clean cover plate Stainless steel side plates Hard anodized push rod and cable drum Adjustable brake Enclosed rollers on control tube Integrated hook Smaller diameter tube protector Includes (1) 050081F Extra spring (1) 054209F Extra main cable assembly (1) 056133 Extra pyramid blade (1) 059049 Extra gooser needle
description_short: The TapeTech 07TT EasyClean® Automatic Taper redefines quality, durability and value.

name: TapeTech Inside Corner Roller w/o Handle
description_full: The TapeTech Inside Corner Roller quickly and accurately embeds the tape firmly into the internal corners of the drywall. Use the corner roller immediately after applying joint tape to the internal corner with the automatic taper. The corner roller forces excess joint compound out from behind the tape in preparation for the corner finisher. The TapeTech Corner Roller features stainless steel rollers for crisp edges and long life. Features Embeds tape into compound at inside corners of walls and ceilings Forces excess joint compound out of corner in preparation for corner finisher/flusher to smooth
description_short: The TapeTech Inside Corner Roller quickly and accurately embeds the tape firmly into the internal corners of the drywall.

name: TapeTech 3" EasyRoll Adjustable Corner Finisher
description_full: The TapeTech EasyRoll Adjustable Corner Finisher is used to perfectly feather both joint compound edges of internal corners in one pass. The Corner Finishers can be used for wall-to-wall internal corners or wall-to-ceiling corners. The adjustable feature of this tool refers to the ability to control the amount of spring pressure by engaging or disengaging one set of tension springs on the back of the corner finisher. Corner Finishers, also referred to as Angle Finishers or Angle Heads, are attached to a corner applicator or the 14TT MudRunner to quickly and professionally finish internal drywall corners. EasyRoll Adjustable Corner Finishers have wheels to provide the smoothest action on the wall and are spring loaded to help compensate for slightly imperfect corners. Use with the FHTT Fiberglass Handle or the XHTT Extension Handle - not included. Features Wipes down excess mud in internal corners Embeds inside corner tape on walls and ceilings Finishes inside corners of walls and ceilings Stainless steel frames Patented, positive ball retainer EasyRoll wheels Adjustable springs
description_short: The TapeTech EasyRoll Adjustable Corner Finisher is used to perfectly feather both joint compound edges of internal corners in one pass.

name: TapeTech 8" Corner Applicator
description_full: The TapeTech Corner Applicator supplies joint compound to the Corner Finishers for fast and efficient finishing of internal corners (angles). Corner Applicators are also used with Mud Heads to quickly and cleanly apply joint compound to internal or external corners for the installation of paper-faced corner bead. TapeTech Corner Applicators feature a stainless steel cone. Use with the FHTT Fiberglass Handle or the XHTT Extension Handle not included. name: TapeTech Bazooka Oil Aerosol Spray 8oz
description_full: Specially formulated for lubricating Automatic Taping and Finishing Tools. Bazooka Oil keeps your tools running free, but more importantly this bazooka oil acts as a water barrier that will keep away corrosion, to extend the life of your drywall tools. Avoid the damage to gaskets wipers and O-rings caused by the use of solvent based lubricants such as WD-40. TapeTech Bazooka Oil is the ideal solution for the TapeTech Automatic Taper, Mud Runner, and any other ATF taping tool.

Both the main tube and the control tube are carbon fiber, a material that will not dent and is temperature-neutral. No more cold tubes in the winter or hot tubes in the summer!

• Carbon Fiber Main Tube and Control Tube
• EasyClean Cover Plate
• Adjustable Brake
• Tool-less Tube Protector
• Tool Hook
